chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI First Appeal No.06 of 2025 Sohail Ahmed Khan Versus Sarwat Tarannum & another Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For hearing of CMA 79/25 2. For orders on office objection/reply “A” 3. For hearing of main case. Dated: 30.09.2025 None present for the appellant. Respondent No.1 Ms. Sarwat Taranum present in person. Mr. Kafeel Ahmed Abbasi, Addl. A.G. -.-.- Since filing of this appeal appellant has not pursued the same as required. On most of the dates he remined absent or sought time. Today also no one is present on behalf of the appellant and no intimation is received. Respondent No.1 is present on the other hand. The instant appeal is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed application. Judge Judge
